project_area: Annual Action Plan for community development and housing programs
demographic_requirements: Open to all residents and organizations within the City of Frederick; public input is encouraged.
eligibility_summary: The PY 2026 Annual Action Plan is open for public review and comment. Eligible applicants include local government agencies, nonprofits, community organizations, and residents within the City of Frederick. The plan focuses on community development and housing programs, with a public hearing scheduled for April 28, 2026.
